name: K2-mod-vehicles-fixes
title: Krastorio 2 mod vehicles Fixes
author: Nezgal
description:
Some tweaks to mod vechicles fuel when used with Krastorio 2:
  - Updates some mods vehicles' grid to only accept vehicle equipment
  - Adds grids to cargo ships & boats
  - Sets AAI industry fuel processing as prerequisite for hauler and chaingunner (they now only use vehicle fuel)
  - Reworks some AAI vehicles costs and technology prerequisites, notably miners. High tier versions are more expensive and require advanced K2 techs
  - Nerfs AAI industry processed fuel to be worse than K2 standard fuel
  - Prevents solid fuel and rocket fuel from being used in machines and vehicles (now only accept K2 vehicle fuels + AAI prcessed fuel)
  - Adds chemical tech card as prerequisite for cargo ships automated bridges and deep sea oil extraction technologies
  - Adds nuclear locomotives as prerequisite for fusion locomotives in K2 clean trains (also transfers fuel efficiency directly to the trains max speed instead of the fuel cells)
  - Reworks some recipe sorting in crafting menu
  - Fixes some vehicles lights

  AAI miner vehicles, locomotives and cargo ships can still use any fuel (not including solid and rocket)

  !!! IF USING WITH AAI MINER READ THE FOLLOWING !!!
  The removal of rocket fuel from chemical fuel categories clashes with AAI miner control script. To fix this, simply change the value of 'local high_fuel_item' at the top of AAI miner mod control.lua to another fuel. Typically this would be kr-advanced-fuel.
